title: Now Hiring Store Manager at Khadim's

jsonLd.title: Now Hiring Store Manager at Khadim's
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Khadim's! We are hiring a Store Manager for our Dhanbad team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Khadim's:
Khadim's is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in KPI Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Referral bonus program
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Life and accident insurance
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Khadim's!
